---
title: "Introduction"
date: "`r Sys.Date()`"
toc: true
execute:
  echo: false
---

```{r}
#| include: false
targets::tar_source('R')
```


Extend social networks with more specific/details. Dyadic measures are important ideas in biology

Producer scrounger 

“animal social highly structured fission fusion to less structured”

Leader follower

Dominance hierarchies

“correlation between leadership and dominance is consistent with a trend in ‘despotic’ social mammals” from Akos_2014

Extend past reviews of dyadic sociality metrics and availability 

Extending spatsoc to bring access
- Given lack of diversity in species, study regions 
- Lack of code availability 

In application:
For considering environment/spatial/geographic context eg. habitat or patch
Eg. if animal is leader given directional correlation delay do they also do X
